name: Applesauce Walnut Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package Butter recipe golden cake mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease and flour two 9-inch round cake pans.
3. In a large mixer bowl, combine the dry cake mix, butter, applesauce, eggs, and cinnamon.
4. Beat for 4 minutes at medium speed.
5. Stir in the chopped black walnuts.
6. Turn batter into pans and spread evenly.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes.
8. Frost with Mocha Frosting (see recipe).
